CurrentIssues.ID: ExplicitItLambdaParameter:AudioMetadataParser.kt$AudioMetadataParser${ _, it -> when (it) { null -> mutableListOf(value) else -> { it.add(value) it } } }

MaxLineLength:AudioMetadataParserTest.kt$AudioMetadataParserTest$// `ORIGINALDATE` is the originalrelease date (e.g. for; rereleases). Taglib maps the `TDOR` (ID3v2.4) and `TORY`; (ID3v2.3) frames to this key.
